positive: A minimalist, abstract representation of a stylized jungle ecosystem. The scene features highly contrasting silhouettes of tropical flora and fauna—such as intricate orchid blooms, stylized toucans, and meandering vine patterns—rendered in deep emerald green, vibrant turquoise, and burnt orange tones. Composition should be perfectly balanced, utilizing negative space effectively to allow for print placement. The style should be vector-graphic inspired, with sharp edges, clean outlines, and a bold, high-contrast aesthetic suitable for apparel printing. Focus on symmetrical or radial arrangement for optimal visual flow. Sunlight filtering through the canopy creates dramatic, geometric shadow patterns, emphasizing clean lines and depth. Highly detailed, pop art influence.
negative: blurry, grainy, poor anatomy, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, monochrome, noisy, logo, trademark, signature, writing
